series_metadata.series_title: Request for Records Retention Schedule (Form DPS129)
series_metadata.series_description: Ohio Department of Public Safety form DPS129 is used by agency records management coordinators to request a new records retention schedule, revise an existing schedule, or request that an existing schedule be made obsolete. This record series includes the form with required routing and approval signatures signifying that the schedule has been approved for submission to the Department of Administrative Services, as well as any supporting documentation, e.g., records analyses.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office of Distribution and Inventory Services two years following date of approved schedule''s publication DAS'' Records Information Management System (RIMS). ; Electronic: in office of Distribution and Inventory Services two years following date of approved schedule''s publication DAS'' Records Information Management System (RIMS)
